title: Amendment to Section 23, paragraph (b.1) of RA 8042
content: The Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) shall regulate private sector participation in recruitment and overseas placement of workers by establishing a licensing and registration system. It shall formulate and implement, in coordination with appropriate entities, a system for promoting and monitoring overseas employment of Filipino workers considering their welfare and domestic manpower needs. The POEA shall inform migrant workers of their rights as workers and human beings, instruct and guide them on asserting their rights, and provide mechanisms to redress violations. Deployment of workers to foreign governments and other employers shall only be to countries with bilateral labor agreements or arrangements with the Philippines, which guarantee protection of Filipino migrant workers' rights and comply with international laws and standards for migrant workers.

metadata.source_file: RA No. 9422 - Strengthening the Regulatory Functions of the POEA.pdf
